description:
This quiz evaluates advanced JavaScript error‑handling skills, focusing on nuanced issues like serialization pitfalls and cross‑context instanceof failures rather than basic try‑catch syntax. It is positioned at a challenging level aimed at distinguishing seasoned developers from juniors, and maintains an engaging, informal teaching tone. The format is multiple‑choice and requires no sign‑up, encouraging quick, self‑paced assessment.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, Serialization edge cases, Cross‑context instanceof behavior, Advanced debugging techniques
Audience: Intermediate to senior JavaScript developers seeking to sharpen their error‑handling expertise
